hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q "\.go" && echo ">> go test ./..." && go test ./... 2>&1 | tail -20; exit 0'
bash -c 'echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q "rsrc_windows_amd64" && echo "ERROR: rsrc_windows_amd64.syso は goversioninfo で生成してください (versioninfo.json -> goversioninfo コマンドを使用)" >&2 && exit 2; exit 0'
